body_txt: The meaning under the text. Here's an example from Woody Allen 's Annie Hall . The subtext is directly under the text, in italic.  The example is about a sexual attraction, but there are tons of other things that it could be about, anything which is not being said out loud about a topic that is present in the context. Note, in particular, that subtext can be (and frequently is) read into a work where none was actually intended by the author .
